==Translingual==

===Han character===
{{Han char|rn=115|rad=禾|as=13|sn=18|four=24961|canj=HDGOW|ids=⿰禾嗇}}

====References====
{{Han ref|kx=0860.420|dkj=25325|dj=1287.040|hdz=42634.050|uh=7A61}}

==Chinese==
{{zh-forms|s=穑|alt=⿰禾𭍠}}

===Glyph origin===
{{Han etym}}
{{Han compound|禾|嗇|ls=psc|c1=s|c2=p|t1=cereal; grain}}. Specialization of {{och-l|嗇}}.

===Etymology 1===
Probably related to {{och-l|采|to pluck|tr=*s.r̥ˤəʔ}} ({{zh-ref|Baxter, 1992}}; {{zh-ref|Sagart, 1999}}; {{zh-ref|Baxter and Sagart, 2014}}). See there for more.

{{zh-ref|Schuessler (2007)}} compares it to {{cog|tbq-lob-pro|*C-šak||to pluck; to pick (a fruit, etc.)}}, as well as {{cog|km|ច្រូត||to reap; to harvest}}.
